cue: Upper Antelope Canyon as a physical place
focus: The canyon interior itself, not the tourists
location_anchor: Upper Antelope Canyon, Lake Powell Navajo Tribal Park, near Page, Arizona, Navajo Nation, USA
description: A narrow slot canyon formed in sandstone, with enclosed passageways, curving walls, filtered light from above, layered rock textures, and guided access only. The target is the canyon itself as a natural structure and spatial environment.

environment_profile.surface_relation: below open sky but inside a narrow rock corridor

cue: Mass ascension phase of the Albuquerque International Balloon Fiesta
focus: The active event at the moment balloons are launching and rising
location_anchor: Balloon Fiesta Park, 4401 Alameda Blvd NE, Albuquerque, New Mexico, USA
description: A large organized balloon event in an open park setting, with many hot-air balloons inflating and rising, strong upward motion, crowd presence, open ground operations, color, noise, anticipation, and coordinated activity.

environment_profile.dominant_context: mass public activity with aerial ascent
environment_profile.surface_relation: broad flat ground with vertical lift above it
